rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Unexpected Internal Process Name

rules.rule_text:
title: Unexpected Internal Process Name
id: a6d26b45-14ea-4ee0-901c-3aefc384d3c9
status: experimental
description: "Detects instances where the powershell process is renamed to notepad\
  \ for defense evasion. \nPart of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rename-system-utilities/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1036
- attack.t1036.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \notepad.exe
    OriginalFileName: powershell.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
